ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_conditions" TEXT /* Any special conditions (e.g., rain, floodlights) */,
  "half_time_score" TEXT /* Score at half-time */,
  "full_time_score" TEXT /* Final score of the match */,
  "deep" INTEGER /* Depth of the match analysis */,
  "deep_allowed" INTEGER /* Depth allowed for analysis */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws in the season */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates if the match was home or away */,
  "loses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the season */,
  "missed" INTEGER /* Number of missed opportunities */,
  "npxG" REAL /* Non-penalty expected goals */,
  "npxGA" REAL /* Non-penalty goals against */,
  "npxGD" REAL /* Non-penalty goal difference */,
  "ppda" TEXT /* Passes per defensive action (ppda) for the match */,
  "ppda_allowed" TEXT /* Allowed ppda for the match */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points earned from the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (win, loss, draw) */,
  "scored" INTEGER /* Goals scored in the match */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the season */,
  "xG" REAL /* Expected goals for the match */,
  "xGA" REAL /* Expected goals against for the match */,
  "xpts" REAL /* Expected points from the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team competes in */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team competes */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays (e.g., Forward, Defender) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot (left, right) */,
  "player_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's image */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Current market value of the player in millions */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status (injured, fit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the performance was recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose performance is recorded */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the match */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played in the match */,
  "touches" INTEGER /* Number of touches (ball contacts) */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside positions */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves (for goalkeepers) */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Percentage of accurate passes */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country in which the league operates */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the league was founded */,
  "league_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "champion" TEXT /* Current champion of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)
